title: KUAC Thanks Rasmuson Foundation for Support During Spring Fundraiser
summary: For the first time, KUAC was the recipient of a discretionary grant from the Rasmuson Foundation, initiated by Rebecca Brice Henderson, owner of Santa’s Vagabond Travel and a Rasmuson board member. The $5,000 donation made a considerable difference in fundraising efforts April 6-8 by motivating dono...
